name: agentops
description: Fresh-context validation for coding-agent work: shape one behavior, run one bounded experiment, and persist an independent verdict.

interface.longDescription: AgentOps helps Codex shape one behavior, run one bounded implementation experiment, validate the exact result from fresh context, and persist a durable verdict. Git, CI, retries, queues, and delivery remain caller-owned.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentOps Plan to define one behavior and its evidence.
Use AgentOps Implement for one bounded RED to GREEN experiment.
Use AgentOps Validate from fresh context to judge the exact candidate.
